title: Variante
description: Filter your Minecraft inventory to a specific version. Only the blocks that existed back then, nothing more.
body:
![variante-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecc97ecd0badccfeaf3b7ca0d61647fb49e258e8.png)

# Variante

**An inventory out of time.**

Variante filters your creative inventory to show only blocks that existed in a specific Minecraft version, keeping your palette historically accurate whether you're recreating a 1.8 build or staying faithful to the era you fell in love with.

## Why Variante?

Modern Minecraft is overflowing with blocks. That's great, until you're trying to build in the style of an older version and find yourself second-guessing every placement. *Did copper exist back then? What about deepslate? Mangrove?*

Variante does the remembering for you. Pick a version, and your inventory snaps back in time.

## Features

- 🧱 **+1000 block entries indexed** from version **1.8** all the way to **1.21.11**
- ⚙️ **Clean config screen**, pick your target version in seconds
- 💻 **Client-side only**, no server install, works in any world
- 🎨 **Built for builders**: terraformers, organic builders, period-accurate recreations

## Gallery

![Config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44b865f504f5ececed121fd8e8b096a8fad3552b_0.webp)

*Pick your target version from a clean, native-style config screen.*

![Filtered inventory](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExODAzMGVxOXNoanppb2F1ZHczdXJiNTAwbThlMW5mOGpqam91dzNvMiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/9G2QeuKbiIJ9RkPLiO/giphy.gif)

*Your creative inventory, trimmed to a specific era.*

![keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b26c65217f28f0acc1cd40e0b73c70a2bc66f1_0.webp)

*Bind the version picker and filter toggle to whatever fits your workflow.*

## Controls

Two keybinds, fully rebindable from Minecraft's standard controls menu:

- **Open Version Picker**: jump straight to the version selector without opening the config screen
- **Toggle Version Filter**: switch the filter on and off instantly, useful for quickly comparing eras or grabbing a modern block when you need one

Every toggle and version change is confirmed with a clean status message, so you never have to guess whether the filter is on, off, or set to a different version than you remember.

## Who is this for?

- **Builders** chasing a specific aesthetic from a past version (or constraints!)
- **Terraformers and organic makers** who want a focused palette without modern noise
- **Content creators** recreating historical builds or "what if" scenarios
- **Purists** who think the inventory peaked in 1.12.2 xD

## Compatibility

- Minecraft **1.21.11** (Java Edition)
- **Fabric** loader
- Client-side, no server install required
